title: biography
content: The life and times of Prince Odoevsky#

title: A new home for 4338
content:
new version in pdf format#This website used to be home to notes on teaching of English for Academic Purposes. Now I’ve decided to switch to my translation of 4338. I believe it’s an important and useful thing to keep online. I plan to add more commentaries on it in future.
1926#This year marks the hundredth anniversary of the publication of 4338 (in approximately its full version) in the magazine “Ogonyok”. There is an English translation by Leland Fetzer in “Pre-Revolutionary Russian Science Fiction: An Anthology” (Ann Arbor 1982), although I’m not sure how easy it would be to find it.
